title: Redstone  Numpad
description:
A simple block that emit configurable redstone signal.
Made to work with Super Factory Manager.
body:
A kind of [Super Factory Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-factory-manager) plugin, but can work without.
It's a simple block that emit configurable redstone signal. There is 16 buttons to select the redstone power emited by the block.

You can shift+right-click the block to open the GUI where you can change signals name.

The screen block display the name of the numpad signal next to it.

Here is the button mapping :

![Button mapping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa92114136a77727de1224a96b403c1db9ce4bc8.png)

To work with SFM, just put it next to the factory manager.

![Numpad next to manager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503224d62e0f9d0038956c1391bff9c83aa8c864.png)

here is a simple example of code:

![SFM code example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fba422e28be3a438d4f78aaea0f8ce2a3c794a5.png)


Futur plan:
  - Enhance right-click accuracy on button.
  - ~~Add a way to customize message when signal switched~~ **Done**.
  - Maybe some tools for debug or else, i don't know....  
  - Add more modloader compat when release
